data.body:
[World of Warships Collab Launch]

Sensei, the ‘World of Warships’ collab has finally begun!
Claim Blue Archive-themed warships and meet the Abydos Foreclosure Force students as daring captains!

➡️ Details: [https://x.com/WorldofWarships](https://x.com/WorldofWarships)

➡️ Details: https://x.com/wows_legends![RWF3eMVwNREJsTZ6glUwSDA1TNKF0Zwt.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/RWF3eMVwNREJsTZ6glUwSDA1TNKF0Zwt.jpg)
